ksa_text: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments using established methodologies, documenting findings, risk ratings, remediation recommendations, and continuous monitoring integration with governance structures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop methods to monitor and measure risk, compliance, and assurance efforts.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to AI Data Quality Manager (ISO) scope — regulatory/compliance signals detected ("compl  :y|ies|ying|iant|iance|iances", "compliance   :monitor|program|manage|require|frame", "governance   :program|mechanism|process|oversight|"). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4396). Domain RC (affinity 0.85) aligns with REG competency profile. Seniority appropriate: describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program execution, or governance oversight.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 4 job-posting-level and 2 framework/certification matches (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, CIPP/E, CRISC). Competency appears regularly in AI compliance and regulatory affairs role descriptions.
